desc.en: High-strength Portland cement ideal for concrete, foundations and structural work.
desc.sw: Saruji Portland yenye nguvu kwa zege, misingi na kazi za muundo.

desc.en: Clean, screened river sand for plastering and concrete mixing.
desc.sw: Mchanga safi wa mto kwa kupaka na kuchanganya zege.

desc.en: Grade 60 deformed steel bar for reinforced concrete structures.
desc.sw: Nondo ya chuma daraja 60 kwa miundo ya zege iliyoimarishwa.

desc.en: Durable galvanized corrugated roofing sheet, rust resistant.
desc.sw: Bati la kudumu lililopakwa zinki, halishiki kutu.

desc.en: Heat-fusion PPR pipe for hot and cold water supply.
desc.sw: Bomba la PPR kwa maji ya moto na baridi.

desc.en: Single-core copper electrical cable for house wiring.
desc.sw: Waya wa shaba kwa uwekaji umeme wa nyumba.

desc.en: Smooth interior and exterior wall emulsion paint, wide color range.
desc.sw: Rangi laini ya kuta za ndani na nje, rangi mbalimbali.

desc.en: Rechargeable cordless drill with variable speed and battery pack.
desc.sw: Drili ya betri inayochajika yenye kasi tofauti na betri.
